description:
With closure_lit Descrs registered in specs (22.10), codegen can resolve closure-call sites to a concrete body spec per caller spec, and emit a direct return_call instead of return_call_indirect through cl+16.

## Scope

In src/ir_codegen.rs:

1. Term::TailCallClosure compile path (line ~4197 area for compile_term, mirror at CallClosure):
   - Look up the closure Var's Descr in the caller's per-spec env (spec_fn_types[sid].vars).
   - If it is a single closure_lit(F, capture_key):
     - Build full body key [capture_key..., arg_descrs_from_caller_env...]
     - Resolve body sid via spec_registry.resolve(F, &full_key); fall back to subsumption.
     - Emit direct return_call to the body sid's compiled func_id, passing cl as the self arg. Captures stay readable from cl+24+i*8 in the body.
     - Coerce each arg to the body sid's param_reprs[i] (skip the first n_captures slots).
   - If union of closure_lits → fall back to existing indirect path (covered by 22.13).
   - If plain arrow (no singleton) → existing indirect path.

2. chain_repr (src/ir_codegen.rs:2675-2734):
   - TailCallClosure case: when the closure Var's Descr is a single closure_lit, resolve body sid and read its chain[csid]. Otherwise existing pessimistic fallback.

3. Term::CallClosure (non-tail) symmetric change: direct call to body sid; cont expects body's return_reprs.

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green.
- fz dump fixtures/apply2.fz: apply2_s[closure_lit(double,[]), 21] emits \`return_call F_double\` (direct), not return_call_indirect through cl+16.
- Bless golden CLIFs for closure-using fixtures: apply2, higher_order, closure_typed_captures, spawn_with_captures. Direct calls replace indirect on resolved singletons.
- No regression on polymorphic-closure fixtures (closure read from data structure / passed dynamically). Indirect path still emits.

## Out of scope

- 22.6 force-drop (next ticket).
- Union-of-singletons direct dispatch (22.13).

## BLOCKED BY

- fz-ul4.27.22.10 [[fz-cps-seam.makeclosure-emit]]

## UNBLOCKS

- fz-cps-seam.force-drop: drop closure_target_fns tagged-return seed and arg-slot force (subsumes fz-ul4.27.22.6)
title: fz-cps-seam.codegen-direct: codegen lowers TailCallClosure to direct return_call on singleton
